title: taraxacum neospurium
intro: Taraxacum neospurium, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum neospurium include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Taraxacum neospurium can be prepared as an herbal remedy through teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
